# Design System: TerraForge Industrial
**Project:** SoilStack Mobile App  
**Stitch Project ID:** 11462852770057418117  
**Generated by:** Gemini 3.1 Pro via Google Stitch

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere
**Creative North Star: "Industrial Stewardship"**  
Earthy-industrial dark theme. Leans into the weight of the earth and precision of industrial data. Feels like a high-end physical dashboard — a bespoke piece of agricultural machinery refined by a laser.

Uses **Tonal Depth** and **Asymmetric Balance**: editorial-inspired compositions where large-scale typography meets tight, data-dense cards. Grown out of the ground, then refined.

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Surface Hierarchy (Tonal Layering)
| Level | Token | Hex | Role |
|-------|-------|-----|------|
| 0 — Foundation | `bg` | `#0B160E` | Base earth background |
| 1 — Sections | `surface` | `#131E16` | Broad content areas |
| 2 — Interaction | `card` | `#212D24` | Cards, modals |
| 3 — Focus | `cardHover` | `#2C382E` | Active/hover states |
| Recessed | `recessed` | `#061009` | Input fields |

### Accent Colors
| Name | Hex | Role |
|------|-----|------|
| Living Green | `#4ADE80` | Primary actions, CTA fill |
| Bright Green | `#6BFB9A` | Highlights, active tab |
| Harvest Gold | `#FFC640` | Pending, warnings |
| Sky Mist | `#9FC6FF` | Info, links, tertiary |

### Text
| Name | Hex | Role |
|------|-----|------|
| On Background | `#D9E6D9` | Primary text |
| On Surface Variant | `#BCCABB` | Secondary text |
| Outline | `#869486` | Tertiary/disabled |
| On Primary | `#003919` | Text on green buttons |

## 3. Typography
- **Display:** SpaceGrotesk Bold, -0.5px tracking — industrial weight
- **Body:** DM Sans Regular/Medium — clean readability
- **Labels:** DM Sans SemiBold, ALL CAPS + 0.05em tracking for data labels
- **Mono:** JetBrains Mono — hashes, coordinates, data

## 4. Component Styles
- **Buttons:** 10px radius, gradient fill (primary→primaryBright at 135°), no border
- **Cards:** 12px radius, tonal shift for depth (no 1px borders), 8px gap separation
- **Inputs:** Recessed appearance (#061009), ghost border on focus
- **Progress:** 4px tall, sheared ends, primary fill on cardHover track
- **Badges:** Pill-shaped, semi-transparent accent background (15% opacity)

## 5. Layout Principles
- Mobile-first, 390×844 target
- 20px horizontal padding
- Asymmetric alignment: headers left, data right
- Generous whitespace lets the Deep Forest breathe
- No solid 1px borders — use tonal shifts and negative space
